use_cases: Dashboard feature cards with status indicators and metrics
Product or service showcase grids with icons and descriptions
Analytics dashboard layouts with real-time data displays
Portfolio or gallery layouts with varied column spans
ai_summary: A customizable Bento Grid layout component for React that arranges content cards in a responsive masonry-style grid. Supports variable column spans, icons, status badges, tags, and hover effects. Built with Tailwind CSS and Lucide icons for modern SaaS dashboards and feature showcases.
